strategy: Attack with Myth or Life (+5% each) and stay off Storm and Death, which he resists 70%.
He is stunable and beguilable; stun him or beguile Giles to control the fight.
He opens by summoning Giles, so bring AoE or plan to split damage.
He self-casts protected Weakness, protected Deathblade, Stormblade, Bladestorm, and a protected Mass Feint; use Cleanse Charm for the Weakness and expect the Mass Feint to amplify his hit.
His incoming healing is cut 45%, so lean on shields if you need to out-sustain him.
Blade up, Cleanse his Weakness off you, then burst him and Giles.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets Bad Juju cast on you; enter on time.
He summons Giles at the start, so be ready to handle two targets with AoE or focus fire.
